security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Shortcuts and automations for your desktop
bundle.longDescription: Free, open-source, cross-platform shortcuts and automations — drag-and-drop action blocks, colorful gradient cards, and OS-level triggers.
